summary_en: 410,000 shares (1.0% S/O) | ¥120.0M limit | open-market purchase | May 22–Jun 30, 2026 | execution price ceiling not disclosed | rationale: enhance shareholder returns and flexibility in capital management alongside 64.3% equity-ratio base
title_en: Notice on Determination of Matters Relating to Acquisition of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: On 21 May 2026, the board of Trade Works Co., Ltd (TSE Standard, code 3997) resolved to acquire up to 410,000 common shares (1.0% of shares outstanding excluding treasury stock) for a maximum total expenditure of ¥120.0 million. The acquisition will be conducted via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange between 22 May and 30 June 2026. No price ceiling per share was disclosed. The company cited balanced capital allocation—combining growth investment, financial soundness (current equity ratio 64.3% as of Q1 FY2026), and enhanced shareholder returns—as the rationale for the program.
